understanding.goal_understanding: Progress through KA59’s levels by positioning every selectable piece onto the goal tiles marked '+' in the semantic grid, with all goals occupied simultaneously to trigger WIN and ultimately complete the final level.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: The currently controlled piece is the one shown as P (with player.id/position), and movement actions (up/down/left/right) shift it by one grid cell (3 pixels) per move unless blocked by walls/bounds or altered by interactions. Some adjacent objects are pushable blocks that can be pushed if directly in the movement direction and space allows; walls generally prevent movement but can have inconsistent blocking behavior so attempted moves are informative even if a 'blocked' hint is shown. When multiple selectables exist, CLICK using the exact pixel/grid position of another selectable switches control to it (turning it into P), enabling coordinated placement of multiple pieces onto multiple '+' tiles at the same time.
